boss.name: The Clockwork Sentinel
boss.victory_condition: Disable the central core using the Voltaic Overload capacitor.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentry triggers a pressure release valve that unlocks the Gear-Works Corridor.
Deactivating the automaton causes the floor panels to retract, leading to the Master Forge.
Defeating the guardian forces the forge to vent its final energy charge, opening the path to the Clockwork Sentinel.

output.objective: Infiltrate the brass fortress and dismantle the Clockwork Sentinel to stop the storm-engine.
output.reward: The Chronos Gear and the title of Storm Architect.
output.setting: A floating city of brass and smoke in a permanent gale.

normalized.setting: A floating city of brass and smoke in a permanent gale.
